title: CobbledGacha v.3 [Cobblemon 1.7] [Fabric/NeoForge 1.21.1]
description: Adds Cobblemon-centric gacha machines that drop awesome loot! Or maybe not?
body:
## **Ever wanted to try a gacha pull experience in Minecraft, with a lot of Pokemon seasoning sprinkled all over it?**
## 

![Poke Gacha Machine](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c184e5b2e21f068e9d0bd31133f03f1982f74801_0.webp)


## **COBBLED GACHA COMES ROLLING IN! THIS TIME AS A STANDALONE MOD!**
(No need to bother yourself about resourcepacks and datapacks, yay!)



Seamlessly integrate a Pokemon-infused gacha machine experience into the world of Cobblemon with this mod!

Put your Relic Coins to "good" use by exchanging them for capsules. 5 Relic Coins will give you a random capsule of varying rarities: Poké Capsule, Great Capsule, Ultra Capsule, Master Capsule, and the rarest of them all: Cherish Capsule!

Each capsule has a plethora of loot waiting to be revealed inside! It could be rare Fossils, valuable Vitamins and Evolution Stones, Held Items, or a bunch of Apricorns? Pray Arceus blesses your RNG.

Experience the thrill of the gamble early on by crafting a Poké Gacha Machine using accesible, easy to find ingredients!


![Crafting recipe Poke Gacha Machine](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7a7949cc2b0c0c958b9554ce56eeb336cc0c300_0.webp)



The mod also brings familiar contraptions from the mainline series games, all craftable and bringing their own distinct flavor to your gacha pulls!

![Mainline machines](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0436b16d5213a7c888d369ee0f1bbb0b5125a6ca_0.webp)





## **OH, A WILD UPDATE v.3 APPEARED! I choose you, Download Button!**

## HAPPY POKEMON DAY!!! To celebrate the fantastic 30th anniversary of Pokemon, CobbledGacha is also joining the festivities and pushing the newest update to the forefront for our avid gacha gamblers!

 

This update separates the already existing gacha machines into three types: **Generic, Specific, and Spawner.**

**Generic** gacha machines take specific currencies and give you general loot.
**Specific** gacha machines take specific currencies and give you specific loot depending on the currency you use.
**Spawner** gacha machines take specific currencies and spawn Pokemon.


![Rocket Prize Master and Plush-O-Matic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75093ab68e6860c1660816f2c1e32f90272b8c95_0.webp)


Coming along to your world are two new exciting machines: the **Rocket Prize Master and the Plush-O-Matic**. Working exactly the same as its anime counterpart, insert a **Koban Coin** into the **Rocket Prize Master**, and get a **Rocket Ball** that will give you a random Pokemon! The catch is that you might have to take the coin by force from a certain feline Pokemon...

On the other hand, in collaboration with the spectacular Pokeblocks mod, the **Plush-O-Matic from Pokemon Friends**, will dispense various adorable plushies in exchange for a menagerie of Yarns that you can craft. For example, putting in Grassy Yarn will net you Grass-type Pokemon plushies, and so on!

**Gacha Balls** also make their first debut, being placeholder items that you can use for your Spawner type gacha machines.

To top it all off, v.3 also brings **various QoL and visual changes**, **global cooldowns for the same machine instances**, and **customizable bucket rates for Spawner type machines!**




## Grab your own Poké Gacha Machine today and add a little more spice and thrill to your Cobblemon world. With this mod, it's as if you're one step closer to basking in that Goldenrod Game Corner vibes!

Join my [Discord server](https://discord.gg/sjyv8HcdP2) for news, discussions, and support for CobbledGacha and my other creations!

Take a look at the capsule loot tables and datapacking guide [here](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1AKjqLy6S8leh_qAg_ATlUcj3T7uENHeOPuBYw7NitX8/edit?usp=sharing)


Modification and monetary use of the files and item sprites are prohibited. If you want to use the sprites and model for something please kindly consult with me first.

**ALL RIGHTS RESERVED.**
